CustomField.description: Apex Cursor Fetch Calls usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsApexCursorFetchCallsMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsApexCursorFetchCallsConsumed__c / LimitsApexCursorFetchCallsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.ApexCursorFetchCalls.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsApexCursorFetchCallsConsumed__c / LimitsApexCursorFetchCallsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.ApexCursorFetchCalls.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsApexCursorFetchCallsConsumed__c / LimitsApexCursorFetchCallsMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsApexCursorFetchCallsConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsApexCursorFetchCallsMax__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Apex Cursor Fetch Calls usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: Apex Cursor Fetch Calls
